nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql: SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, b.id AS board_id, au.code AS board_code, fc1.name AS primary_evaluator_name, fc2.name AS review_evaluator_name FROM answer_script a JOIN board b ON b.course_id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_pri ON ea_pri.script_id = a.id AND ea_pri.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND ea_pri.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea_pri.is_active = TRUE JOIN script_assignment sa_pri ON sa_pri.id = ea_pri.assignment_id JOIN faculty_cache fc1 ON fc1.id = sa_pri.faculty_cache_id JOIN script_assignment sa_rev ON sa_rev.script_id = a.id AND sa_rev.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND sa_rev.is_active = TRUE JOIN faculty_cache fc2 ON fc2.id = sa_rev.faculty_cache_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea_rev ON ea_rev.script_id = a.id AND ea_rev.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND ea_rev.is_active = TRUE WHERE a.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED' AND a.scan_status = 'SCANNED' AND a.block_status IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE') AND ea_rev.id IS NULL;
error: Validation failed (schema): Unknown table or alias 'ea_rev' referenced in 'ea_rev.id'. Ensure it is declared in the FROM/JOIN clause.
